content: # Camera Obscura & Holograph Gallery. ## Camera Obscura & Holograph Gallery attraction highlights. For an offbeat visual treat, visit San Francisco's Camera Obscura. Built in 1946 and featuring an exterior that looks like a giant camera, this unusual attraction stands on Point Lobos Avenue near Ocean Beach.
